text: Being here, I am caught between curiosity and contemplation. The glass walls and modern lines evoke a sense of openness, yet everything appears orderly and minimal, almost sterile. When I move further, the vibrant R+D wall and its interactive displays awaken my mind to questions of progress—what role do I play within research and development, as an active yet reflective participant? I feel like an observer poised on the edge of discovery, aware that behind every innovation lies the silent labor of thought and the humility of not knowing all answers.
